nodes.label: ADR 0002: Shared database, shared schema, tenant_id-scoped multi-tenancy
nodes.rationale: Legacy already runs every School through one shared MySQL DB/schema distinguished by a company/school ID column. Kept that shape in Postgres: one DB, one schema, school_id column per School-scoped table, enforced by Postgres RLS plus app-layer checks. Rejected schema-per-tenant and database-per-tenant: they multiply migration/operational complexity and conflict with the free-tier/prototype-first hosting approach (single small Postgres instance, not N databases).
